changes.summary: BC-08 DistributeOnWithdrawalUseCase extracted from InvestmentService.distributeOnWithdrawal. Contract-percent split with C-4 rounding, wallet credits, earningsHistory updates, and investor notifications. Skips investor split when post.investingEnabled !== true.

BC-08 HandlePostCloseUseCase extracted from InvestmentService.handlePostClose. Mode A/B close distribution (distributeAllByContractOnClose) runs only when investingEnabled and investors present; delegates rating slices to DistributeOnWithdrawalUseCase.
BC-08 InvestInProjectUseCase extracted from ProjectService.investInProject. Global wallet debit, projectInvestments append, CommunityWallet deposit when investingEnabled.
BC-08 ExecuteProjectPayoutUseCase wraps ProjectPayoutService preview/execute/executeAll. Member preview gate preserved; CommunityWallet debit and founder/investor/team split unchanged.

InvestmentService wires createDistributeOnWithdrawalUseCase and createHandlePostCloseUseCase in constructor; distributeOnWithdrawal and handlePostClose delegate to use cases. PostClosingService and withdraw-publication-rating callers unchanged.
ProjectService wires InvestInProjectUseCase and ExecuteProjectPayoutUseCase; investInProject, previewProjectPayout, executeProjectPayout, and closeProject payout sweep delegate to use cases.

notes: Use case files created alongside domain-service wiring (required for compilation; pattern matches team-invitation.service interim domain→application import). Routers continue calling domain services which forward to use cases.
